name: Fried Oyster Hot Pot
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Beef rib eye, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean oysters in salted water and drain.
2. Heat salad oil in a skillet.
3. Dredge oysters in flour, then in beaten eggs, and fry.
4. Blanch onion, daikon, and carrot separately in boiling salted water.
5. Season beef with 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 1 teaspoon sesame oil, 1 teaspoon minced garlic, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper.
6. Place seasoned beef in a skillet and layer with vegetables.
7. Combine remaining broth with the rest of the soy sauce, sesame oil, minced garlic, and pepper; pour over vegetables and beef.
8. Cover and bring to a boil.
9. Top with oysters, watercress, and green onions.
10. Cook until heated through. Makes 6 servings.
